name: Circuit Tech Dark
tagline: Dark technical deck with terminal panels, circuit grids, architecture nodes, and neon system metrics.

palette.description: Near-black technical canvas with electric cyan, violet, and mint accents for panels, traces, and system metrics.

typography.style: Monospace headings and clean UI body text for technical precision.

best_for: Technical strategy, platform architecture, AI infrastructure narratives, developer tool launches, and system diagrams that need a dark dashboard feel.
avoid_for: Warm brand storytelling, people-centric culture decks, or traditional consulting reports.

source_inspiration.name: Tech & Engineering Dark Mode Slide Deck
source_inspiration.notes: Original HTML template rebuilt from public visual direction only; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
